message:
feat(core): add FleetScrollbackCoordinator bridging memory decisions to pane scrollback

Implements the runtime coordinator for ft-1memj.19 that bridges
FleetMemoryController decisions with per-pane TieredScrollback instances.
The coordinator evaluates pressure signals, produces proportional or
emergency eviction plans via FleetScrollbackOrchestrator, and applies
them to concrete scrollback data.

Key types: CoordinatorConfig, CoordinatorTelemetry, EvaluationResult,
PaneScrollbackAccess trait (with HashMap<u64, TieredScrollback> impl).
18 unit tests + 6 proptest serde roundtrip cases, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
